overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 featuring Geralt of Rivia walking through a lush summer meadow along a winding dirt path. He passes through a dilapidated wooden shed structure before continuing toward distant mountains under a bright turquoise sky.

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the dirt path surrounded by wildflowers and trees

entered.detail: winding dirt trail through the meadow with visible tire tracks
lush grass with purple lupines and red poppies
lush grass with white daisies and yellow flowers
dense green trees lining the path
dense green trees lining the path
distant blue mountains on the horizon under bright sky

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a winding dirt path through a vibrant summer meadow filled with colorful wildflowers. The path is flanked by dense deciduous forests on both sides with distant mountains visible under a clear turquoise sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: dilapidated wooden shed in overgrown meadow

events.description: Geralt turns left off the main dirt path toward the wooden structure
Enters the dark interior of the dilapidated wooden shed

agents.ego_description: Geralt veers off the path and walks through tall grass and bushes to enter the abandoned wooden shed

entered.detail: weathered wooden structure with broken roof beams and missing walls

segments.scene_description: Geralt turns off the main path and approaches a dilapidated wooden shed partially hidden in dense vegetation. He enters the structure, passing through its shaded interior with broken wooden beams overhead, while distant mountains remain visible through the gaps in the walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: open countryside meadow path continuing toward mountains

events.description: Exits the wooden shed back into the bright open meadow

agents.ego_description: Geralt continues walking along the dirt path toward the distant mountains

entered.detail: winding dirt trail continuing through the meadow toward the horizon

segments.scene_description: After passing through the shed, Geralt emerges back into the bright sunlight and continues along the dirt path. The trail winds through the wildflower meadow with dense forests on the left and the mountain range growing more prominent ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a vibrant summer meadow that briefly dips into a shaded ruin before returning to the open landscape. It begins with Geralt walking along a winding dirt path flanked by dense deciduous forests and colorful wildflowers under a clear turquoise sky. As he turns off the main trail, the scene shifts from the bright exterior into the shaded interior of a dilapidated wooden shed, where broken beams frame views of the distant mountains. After passing through the structure, the camera emerges back into the brilliant sunlight as Geralt rejoins the path. The scene finally expands across the wildflower meadow once more, with the mountain range growing more prominent ahead.
